summary: Completed testing of offline mode removal. All pages load correctly from API (no IndexedDB fallback). Global axios interceptor for connection errors is properly set up. Auto-code generation works. All core API endpoints verified.

issues: Console warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - this is a hydration error in the Recent Vouchers table (low priority, cosmetic)

critical_code_review_comments: Global axios interceptor correctly catches 'Network Error' and 'ECONNABORTED' and shows toast notifications
SyncProvider, SyncStatusIndicator, OfflineBanner, OfflineToast have been removed from Layout.jsx and App.js
All pages (Customers, Suppliers, ChartOfAccounts, CrDbNotes, VoucherEntry, Inventory, POS) have offline imports removed
Minor HTML hydration warning on DashboardPage table - <tr> inside <span> wrapper (cosmetic, does not affect functionality)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Offline mode has been completely removed. All pages now load data directly from API. Global axios interceptor handles connection errors. Previous iterations (12-13) tested auto-code generation, exchange rate visibility, z-index fix, and recent transactions widget - all passed.

features_tested.login_flow: PASS - Login with credentials works correctly

features_tested.customers_page: PASS - Loads data, Add Customer works with auto-code (4111xxxxx)
features_tested.pos_page: PASS - Inventory items load from server
